prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VG30DETT** (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 300+ hp stock) with a **Garrett GTX3582R** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate for precise boost control (target: 1.5 bar / 21.7 psi).

Full **HKS Hi-Power** stainless steel 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust system with **custom 4-2-1 unequal-length headers** (304-grade stainless, 1.75-inch primaries) and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller for fine-tuned response.

Standalone **Haltech Elite 2500** ECU with **Nissan Consult-II** adapter harness, running **ID1000** fuel injectors (1000cc/min), **Walbro 450LPH** in-tank fuel pump, and a **Nismo 555cc/min** high-flow fuel rail for the VG30DETT. Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (Y32-specific valving, 8kg/mm front / 6kg/mm rear springs) and **Nismo 4-piston front brake calipers** (280mm rotors) with **Project Mu 999.9 compound brake pads**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Y32** widebody kit (custom-fabricated front fenders, rear overfenders, and aggressive side skirts) with **carbon fiber front splitter** (JUN-style, 3-piece) and **custom aluminum rear diffuser** (integrated dual 3.5-inch exhaust exits).

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15** (front) and **18x10.5 +25** (rear) wheels with **Yokohama Advan A052** semi-slick tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Paint: **Nissan ‘Midnight Purple III’ (KH3) with matte black roof** and **JDM-spec ‘Cedric’ rear badging (chrome delete, blacked-out script)**.

**Custom interior roll cage** (8-point, TIG-welded mild steel, **Sparco Pro 2000** seats with **Takata Drift II** harnesses) and **Nismo S-Tune** steering wheel (380mm, suede-wrapped). Full **LED conversion** (DRLs: **Morimoto XB LED bulbs**, taillights: **VLED 7440-CK** sequential units) with **custom HID projector headlights** (35W, 6000K, **Koito Bi-Xenon projectors**).
